title: Atomic Action
description: A single atomic action generated by the agent during the Perception-Action Event Stream loop.

action.description: The type of atomic environmental interaction to perform.

path.description: The file path targeted by ReadFile or WriteFile. Ignored for others.

content.description: The exact literal content for WriteFile. Ignored for others.

command.description: The exact bash command to run for ExecuteSafeCommand. Ignored for others.

status.description: The status returned when ConcludeTask is called.

reasoning.description: A brief internal monologue explaining why this action was chosen based on the event ledger.
